leadText: Aquacorde Town (Japanese: メイスイタウン Meisui Town) is a town located in the southeastern part of the Kalos region. It is the place where the player gets their first partner Pokémon. To the town's south is Route 1, while north is Route 2 and Santalune Forest. The town has a classic colonial appearance with several European-style apartment buildings and streetlights. It is bordered on the north by a river, and in the center of the town is a fountain.

sections.title: Slogan
sections.text: Slogan [ edit | edit source ] Water and civilization in harmony. (Japanese: 川面に よりそう 町 The town nestled close to the river. )

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Shops 1.2 Pokémon healing 1.3 Photo Spot Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Shops [ edit | edit source ] In Aquacorde Town, there are two shops. The shop on the west side of the town is a specialized Poké Ball Shop, which only sells regular Poké Balls. The shop on the east side of the town is a Potions shop. They sell "only the best potions". West shop Poké Ball $ 200 East shop Potion $ 300 Pokémon healing [ edit | edit source ] Aquacorde Town does not have a formal Pokémon Center , but in the northeastern shop in the town, a woman will heal the player's Pokémon if they are hurt. Photo Spot [ edit | edit source ] Near the river is a Photo Spot where the player can call Phil the Photo Guy to take a picture. The picture is taken on the path into Aquacorde Town from Route 1, underneath the arch. It is not available at the start of the game; the sign reads "The Photo Spot is still under construction." when interacted with.
